title: SQL: Mserver crashes on division by 0
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_division (a Int32, b Int32, c Float32, d String);
SELECT a / NULLIF(b, 0) AS division_result FROM test_division WHERE c > 2.0;
SELECT d, a / NULLIF(c, 0) AS a_div_c FROM test_division WHERE b = 0;
key_bug_features: Division by zero in SQL query causes crash
